item.title: Becton Dickinson & Co.: BD GasPak EZ CO2 Pouch System. Catalog Number: 260684. for microbiologic use Recall
item.product: BD GasPak EZ CO2 Pouch System. Catalog Number: 260684. for microbiologic use
item.summary: BD identified an issue affecting certain lots of BD GasPak EZ CO2 and BD GasPak EZ Campy Gas Generating Pouch Systems, where gas generating sachets may produce carbon dioxide levels below specification. Product details: BD GasPak EZ CO2 Pouch System. Catalog Number: 260684. for microbiologic use
item.affectedPeople: Worldwide distribution - US Nationwide and the country of Hong Kong.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
